creator: mckusick@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mateusz Kwiatkowski from comment #22)
Trying to reproduce your test.

The problem that I have is that I cannot increase the size of the virtual disk in my virtual machine.

What is the program `vm' that you are using?
I use `/usr/share/examples/bhyve/vmrun.sh' and it does not have an option to set the disk size in the started up virtual machine.
